Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the existing model The example provided has some basic constraints like existence of StartApplication and FinalDecision init constraint for StartApplication coexistence between StartApplication and FinalDecision response from StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo and succession from RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The key here is to ensure that decisions arent made based on sensitive attributes without proper checks So possible sensitive attributes could be activities like CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender etc

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: So typical activities might include StartApplication CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge RequestAdditionalInfo ManualReview Approve Reject FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For example adding a non succession constraint between CheckRace and Reject meaning CheckRace cannot be immediately followed by Reject Instead there must be some mitigation step in between

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That would be a precedence constraint precedence ManualReview Reject meaning ManualReview must precede Reject Yes precedence A B means that if B occurs then A must have occurred before it

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So adding precedence ManualReview Reject would ensure that every Reject is preceded by a ManualReview Similarly for Approve decisions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: coexistence is bidirectional So if CheckRace happens ManualReview must happen and vice versa But maybe we only want that whenever a sensitive attribute is checked a ManualReview is done So coexistence CheckRace ManualReview would enforce that Alternatively response CheckRace ManualReview would mean that if CheckRace happens ManualReview must happen eventually

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But coexistence is bidirectional so if ManualReview occurs CheckRace must occur which may not be desired So perhaps response CheckRace ManualReview is better

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: response CheckRace ManualReview meaning that if CheckRace occurs ManualReview must occur eventually Add precedence ManualReview Approve and precedence ManualReview Reject ensuring that decisions are only made after a review Add non succession constraints between sensitive attribute activities and decision activities

Name: Validation - PE
Text: DECLARE is a constraint based process modeling language that deals with activity sequences not data attributes Therefore to model fairness constraints we have to assume that certain activities correspond to handling sensitive data

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the main additions are non succession constraints between sensitive attribute activities and decision activities precedence constraints requiring ManualReview before decisions response constraints requiring ManualReview after sensitive attribute checks

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Non succession constraints prevent sensitive attribute checks CheckRace etc from directly leading to decisions Reject Approve forcing an intermediate step like ManualReview Precedence constraints ensure that any decision Approve Reject is only made after a ManualReview Response constraints ensure that whenever a sensitive attribute is checked a ManualReview is eventually performed
